member.name: T:JellyFusion.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Root configuration for the JellyFusion plugin.

member.name: P:JellyFusion.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.Language
member.summary: UI language: "es" | "en" | "pt" | "fr"

member.name: P:JellyFusion.Configuration.HomeConfig.DataSource
member.summary: Data source: "Local" | "TMDB" | "MDBList" | "Trakt"

member.name: P:JellyFusion.Configuration.HomeConfig.Rails
member.summary: Rails enabled on the home page, in visible order (top→bottom).

member.name: P:JellyFusion.Configuration.SliderConfig.PlatformStyle
member.summary: Visual style: "netflix" | "disney" | "prime" | "apple"

member.name: P:JellyFusion.Configuration.BadgesConfig.BadgeOrder
member.summary: Badge order (index = priority, lower = rendered first / top).

member.name: P:JellyFusion.Configuration.BadgesConfig.CustomText
member.summary: Custom text overrides for badge labels. Keyed by badge type (e.g. "4K", "HDR10", "HEVC", "DolbyAtmos"). Uses a List instead of Dictionary so Jellyfin's XmlSerializer can persist it.

member.name: P:JellyFusion.Configuration.ThemeConfig.ActiveTheme
member.summary: Default | Netflix | PrimeVideo | DisneyPlus | AppleTvPlus | Crunchyroll | ParamountPlus

member.name: P:JellyFusion.Configuration.NavigationConfig.ReplaceMyContent
member.summary: Replace "Mi Contenido" with fixed shortcuts.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Configuration.CustomTextEntry
member.summary: A single badge-label override: Key = badge type identifier, Value = display string (e.g. Key="4K", Value="UHD").

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController
member.summary: REST API for the JellyFusion plugin. Base route: /jellyfusion

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.GetConfig
member.summary: GET current plugin configuration.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.SaveConfig(JellyFusion.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: POST — save full plugin configuration.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.GetHomeRails(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: GET all enabled home rails resolved against the selected data source.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.GetSliderItems(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: GET slider items for the current user.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.GetTrailer(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: GET trailer URL for a specific item.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.GetBadgePreview(System.Guid)
member.summary: GET preview image with badges for a specific item (used by Live Preview).

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.ClearCache
member.summary: POST — clear the badge image cache.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.GetCacheStats
member.summary: GET badge cache statistics.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.UploadCustomBadge(System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: POST — upload a custom badge image.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.DeleteCustomBadge(System.String)
member.summary: DELETE — revert a custom badge to default.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.GetStudios
member.summary: GET all configured studios with their browse URLs.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.GetThemeCss
member.summary: GET CSS for the active theme (injected by client script).

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.TestNotification(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: POST — send a test notification to Discord or Telegram.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Controllers.JellyFusionController.GetI18n(System.String)
member.summary: GET all localization strings for the requested (or current) language.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.LocalizationService
member.summary: Loads and provides translated strings from embedded JSON resources. Supported languages: es (Español Latino), en (English), pt (Português), fr (Français).

member.name: M:JellyFusion.LocalizationService.Get(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a translated string. Falls back to key if not found.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.LocalizationService.GetAllForLanguage(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all cached key/value pairs for the given language, merged on top of English as a fallback layer.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Middleware.BadgeMiddleware
member.summary: ASP.NET Core middleware that intercepts Jellyfin image requests and composites JellyTag badges onto posters and thumbnails server-side. Works for ALL Jellyfin clients without any client-side configuration.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Middleware.BadgeMiddlewareStartup
member.summary: Wires into the ASP.NET Core request pipeline so that badge overlays are composited on every Jellyfin image request. Registered as an so Jellyfin picks it up automatically.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Badges.BadgeRenderService
member.summary: Composites quality badges onto Jellyfin poster/thumbnail images server-side. Supports Resolution, HDR, Codec, Audio, Language (with LAT/SUB logic), and Status (NUEVO / KID) badges.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Badges.BadgeRenderService.Ct(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{JellyFusion.Configuration.CustomTextEntry},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Looks up a custom text override from the list by key. Returns if no override is found. Replaces Dictionary.GetValueOrDefault so the config can be XML-serialized.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Badges.BadgeRenderService.RenderBadges(System.Byte[],MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem,JellyFusion.Configuration.BadgesConfig,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Composites badges onto and returns the resulting JPEG/PNG/WebP bytes.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Badges.BadgeService
member.summary: Thin wrapper around ILibraryManager for badge-related item lookups.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Badges.ImageCacheService
member.summary: In-memory + disk cache for badge-composited images. Prevents re-rendering on every request.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Badges.ImageCacheService.Get(System.String,System.TimeSpan)
member.param: Must match the TTL passed to so that disk-cached files are expired with the same policy as in-memory entries.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Home.HomeService
member.summary: Resolves the items for each enabled Home rail. Supports Local library queries plus external trending sources (TMDB, MDBList, Trakt) when the user supplies an API key.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Home.HomeService.BuildRailsAsync(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a lightweight payload describing every enabled rail.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Notifications.NotificationHostedService
member.summary: Background service that listens for new library items and sends notifications to Discord / Telegram when configured.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Notifications.NotificationService
member.summary: Public API for sending ad-hoc notifications from other modules. Also exposes a "send test" helper used by the config page.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Notifications.NotificationService.SendTestAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a plain test message to the specified channel ("discord" | "telegram"). Reads the current plugin configuration for webhook / bot credentials.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Slider.SliderHostedService
member.summary: Background service stub for slider pre-warming and refresh tasks.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Slider.SliderService
member.summary: Selects and returns the items to display in the Editor's Choice banner slider based on the configured mode (Favourites / Random / Collections / New).

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Slider.SliderService.GetSliderItemsAsync(JellyFusion.Configuration.SliderConfig,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the list of items for the slider given current configuration.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Slider.TrailerService
member.summary: Fetches trailer URLs from TMDB for the Editor's Choice slider. Respects the configured trailer language and falls back to subtitled version when no dubbed version is available.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Slider.TrailerService.GetTrailerUrlAsync(MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem,JellyFusion.Configuration.SliderConfig,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the best trailer URL for given the config. Returns null if none found.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Studios.StudiosService.GetItemCountForStudio(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the count of items in the library that belong to . Used to validate that a studio has content before showing it in the UI.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Studios.StudiosService.GetStudioBrowseUrl(JellyFusion.Configuration.StudioItem)
member.summary: Returns the Jellyfin browse URL for a studio by name.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Modules.Themes.ThemeService
member.summary: Returns CSS variable overrides for each built-in theme. Injected into the page via the client script.

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Themes.ThemeService.NormalisedFont(System.String)
member.summary: Normalises a FontFamily config value. "system", empty string, or null all mean "use the default/fallback value".

member.name: M:JellyFusion.Modules.Themes.ThemeService.GetThemeCss(JellyFusion.Configuration.ThemeConfig)
member.summary: Returns an inline CSS block with theme variables for the active theme.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.Plugin
member.summary: JellyFusion v2.0.0 — All-in-one Jellyfin enhancement plugin. Combines Banner (Editor's Choice), Smart Tags (JellyTag), Studios, Home rails, Themes, Navigation and Notifications into a single plugin.

member.name: P:JellyFusion.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Global singleton instance.

member.name: T:JellyFusion.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers all JellyFusion services into the Jellyfin DI container.
